TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nakamuwan_ni_Cay-Ing-Wen_cung-tung_tu_paniyul_a_sakakapah, title = nakamuwan_ni_Cay-Ing-Wen_cung-tung_tu_paniyul_a_sakakapah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nakamuwan_ni_Cay-Ing-Wen_cung-tung_tu_paniyul_a_sakakapah} }

S.FORM: nakamuwan ni Cay-Ing-Wen cung-tung tu paniyul a sakakapah i 2016 a amihcan u cung-tung nu taywan ci Cay-ing-wen, napatadikud tu kamu paniyul a pakakapah tu nadikudan, i binacadan nu itaywanay, sakamu sa ci Cay-ing-wen, yu mahida henay mahkatayni ku namakayniyay i hulam a tademaw, anu layak aca atu hitay nu Hulam aca, tayni ku heni i taywan sa misawacu i tamuwan u Binacadan a yincumin, saan patadikud tu sasakamun i titaan u Binacadan , u nipatadikud nida tina kamuwan sa, caay kau la'tusay u kapahay tuway kina kawaw tuyniyan, nika, sakamu saan ku katuuday. anu tatenga' patadikud tu sasakamuen, panacacay han ku kawaw kya u tatenga'ay patadikud, saan ku nipangiha' nu katuuday, adiha hansa inayi' ku cacacacay aca nu wayway, tadaw u nipahemul a cacay tu kamu i Binacadan, saan amin ku mitapalay . anu tatenga' mi patadikud tu sasakamun sakamu satu ku mitapalay i tini i taywan; anu i cuwacuwaay a Binacadan, malecalecad ku nipiadih mutapal tina kawawan, i nayi' ku heci nina nipipatadikud tu kamu saan, idayhan u paduh acacay inayi' ku nilacul tu heci saan, u muhalhalay tu amin ku katuuday a Binacadan, tu nipilacul ni Cay-ing-wen tu nakamuwan nida, tu nipatadikudan a kamu tu nilacul a heci, katukuh ayda inayi' ku tekiteki nu nipakilukilul aca, sepat henay a mihcan mamin tu misinkiw, tu sakinatusa nida a malaCung-tung, caay haw? an idaw ku balucu' nida, amipatadikud tu nikapatelacan i tawya i kasumamadan, kau namakay labuway nu balacu' a kamu ku sapatahekal, patengil tu katuuday a binacadan, kya amasinanut ku nipitengil nu katuuday mitapal. wycanan ku pingalalan nu binacadan ayda uycanan ku hahalhalen nu Binacadan tu tatenga'ay a nipatadikud tu sasakamuen, uycanan ku ngalalen nu katuuday tu nipaini tu sasakamuen, wahacacay han nu Kanatal a mupabelih i binawlan, u sasalabuen, u sahenulay a kawaw tu sakay tini i sabawenemay a Binacadan. sakacacay, wahican nu Kanatal pasukas kuni alawan, i Binacadan tu lala'i kasumamadan, u naumahan nu Binawlan i tawya, anyaan pasukas ku kanatal a saheciyn musakamu kya, amasulinga' ku nipitengil nu binawlan. sakatusa, wacaay haw pasukas ku kanatal, tu naumahan nu babalaki i kasumamadan tulala', unaluma'an u nikabulawan malimad,uni kaykaydaan mi lami' miadup atu babutingan, aydaan u papasukasen amin nu kanatal kumahiniyay a lala'. sakatulu, u kamu nu Binacadan i , nikatayniyan nu kahulaman i taywan, lawpes saca kukamu nu Binacadan i nyadu', katukuh ayda amakaala tu waluway abataan ku mihecan, maliyuh tuamin ku wadiwawa nu binacadan, musakamu tu tadakamu nu binacadan, amalawlawpes tu kukamu inyadu', u lalangawen u tuudamin unanam tu sakaudip nunyadu', umahiniyay a kawaw caay kawnikakayi nu binawlan caay kaw nipiales nu binawlan , uni padetengan nu kanatal apa satedep mu sakamu tukamu numita, u mahiniyay a kawaw ahican nu kanatal misakaliyuh ku mahiniyay a kawaw. u sakasepat, wapatibeng mi sanga' ku tkanatal tu cacudadan nu Binacadan, awnu Binacadan amin ku pasubana'ay i cacudadan, kya ama palekal ku mamalawpesay tu a kamu nu binacadan, hinien ku kakawaw kya u tatenga'ay ani pasukas tu sasakamun, palu tatenga' ku katuudaya Binacadan. u sakalima sa, anu tatenga'patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i binacadan hawsa, ku hakalamkam han paculil patapabaw pacumud i kinpu, tu nisanga'an tu hulic nu binacadan, tu sakay tini i naumahan unubayu, atu sapi siteked nu binacadan milhida maudip, itini i taywan kya u tatenga'ay ani patadikud tukawaw.
S.PHON: nakamuwan ni ¶aj-i≈ã-w…ôn ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã tu panijur~…æ a sakakapaƒß i **** a amiƒß ¶an u ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã nu tajwan ¶i ¶aj-i≈ã-w…ôn, napatadikud tu kamu panijur~…æ a pakakapaƒß tu nadikudan, i bina ¶adan nu itajwanaj, sakamu sa ¶i ¶aj-i≈ã-w…ôn, ju maƒßida ƒß…ônaj maƒßkatajni ku namakajnijaj i ƒßur~…æam a tad…ômaw, anu r~…æajak a ¶a atu ƒßitaj nu ƒßur~…æam a ¶a, tajni ku ƒß…ôni i tajwan sa misawa ¶u i tamuwan u bina ¶adan a jin ¶umin, saan patadikud tu sasakamun i titaan u bina ¶adan , u nipatadikud nida tina kamuwan sa, ¶aaj kau r~…æa î~ °tusaj u kapaƒßaj tuwaj kina kawaw tujnijan, nika, sakamu saan ku katuudaj. anu tat…ô≈ãa î~ ° patadikud tu sasakamu…ôn, pana ¶a ¶aj ƒßan ku kawaw kja u tat…ô≈ãa î~ °aj patadikud, saan ku nipa≈ãiƒßa î~ ° nu katuudaj, adiƒßa ƒßansa inaji î~ ° ku ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj a ¶a nu wajwaj, tadaw u nipaƒß…ômur~…æ a ¶a ¶aj tu kamu i bina ¶adan, saan amin ku mitapar~…æaj . anu tat…ô≈ãa î~ ° mi patadikud tu sasakamun sakamu satu ku mitapar~…æaj i tini i tajwan; anu i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a bina ¶adan, mar~…æ…ô ¶ar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku nipiadiƒß mutapar~…æ tina kawawan, i naji î~ ° ku ƒß…ô ¶i nina nipipatadikud tu kamu saan, idajƒßan u paduƒß a ¶a ¶aj inaji î~ ° ku nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ tu ƒß…ô ¶i saan, u muƒßar~…æƒßar~…æaj tu amin ku katuudaj a bina ¶adan, tu nipir~…æa ¶ur~…æ ni ¶aj-i≈ã-w…ôn tu nakamuwan nida, tu nipatadikudan a kamu tu nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ a ƒß…ô ¶i, katukuƒß ajda inaji î~ ° ku t…ôkit…ôki nu nipakir~…æukir~…æur~…æ a ¶a, s…ôpat ƒß…ônaj a miƒß ¶an mamin tu misinkiw, tu sakinatusa nida a mar~…æa ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã, ¶aaj ƒßaw? an idaw ku bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° nida, amipatadikud tu nikapat…ôr~…æa ¶an i tawja i kasumamadan, kau namakaj r~…æabuwaj nu bar~…æa ¶u î~ ° a kamu ku sapataƒß…ôkar~…æ, pat…ô≈ãir~…æ tu katuudaj a bina ¶adan, kja amasinanut ku nipit…ô≈ãir~…æ nu katuudaj mitapar~…æ. wj ¶anan ku pi≈ãar~…æar~…æan nu bina ¶adan ajda uj ¶anan ku ƒßaƒßar~…æƒßar~…æ…ôn nu bina ¶adan tu tat…ô≈ãa î~ °aj a nipatadikud tu sasakamu…ôn, uj ¶anan ku ≈ãar~…æar~…æ…ôn nu katuudaj tu nipaini tu sasakamu…ôn, waƒßa ¶a ¶aj ƒßan nu kanatar~…æ a mupab…ôr~…æiƒß i binawr~…æan, u sasar~…æabu…ôn, u saƒß…ônur~…æaj a kawaw tu sakaj tini i sabaw…ôn…ômaj a bina ¶adan. saka ¶a ¶aj, waƒßi ¶an nu kanatar~…æ pasukas kuni ar~…æawan, i bina ¶adan tu r~…æar~…æa î~ °i kasumamadan, u naumaƒßan nu binawr~…æan i tawja, anjaan pasukas ku kanatar~…æ a saƒß…ô ¶ijn musakamu kja, amasur~…æi≈ãa î~ ° ku nipit…ô≈ãir~…æ nu binawr~…æan. sakatusa, wa ¶aaj ƒßaw pasukas ku kanatar~…æ, tu naumaƒßan nu babar~…æaki i kasumamadan tur~…æar~…æa î~ °, unar~…æuma î~ °an u nikabur~…æawan mar~…æimad,uni kajkajdaan mi r~…æami î~ ° miadup atu babuti≈ãan, ajdaan u papasukas…ôn amin nu kanatar~…æ kumaƒßinijaj a r~…æar~…æa î~ °. sakatur~…æu, u kamu nu bina ¶adan i , nikatajnijan nu kaƒßur~…æaman i tajwan, r~…æawp…ôs sa ¶a kukamu nu bina ¶adan i njadu î~ °, katukuƒß ajda amakaar~…æa tu war~…æuwaj abataan ku miƒß…ô ¶an, mar~…æijuƒß tuamin ku wadiwawa nu bina ¶adan, musakamu tu tadakamu nu bina ¶adan, amar~…æawr~…æawp…ôs tu kukamu injadu î~ °, u r~…æar~…æa≈ãaw…ôn u tuudamin unanam tu sakaudip nunjadu î~ °, umaƒßinijaj a kawaw ¶aaj kawnikakaji nu binawr~…æan ¶aaj kaw nipiar~…æ…ôs nu binawr~…æan , uni pad…ôt…ô≈ãan nu kanatar~…æ apa sat…ôd…ôp mu sakamu tukamu numita, u maƒßinijaj a kawaw aƒßi ¶an nu kanatar~…æ misakar~…æijuƒß ku maƒßinijaj a kawaw. u sakas…ôpat, wapatib…ô≈ã mi sa≈ãa î~ ° ku tkanatar~…æ tu ¶a ¶udadan nu bina ¶adan, awnu bina ¶adan amin ku pasubana î~ °aj i ¶a ¶udadan, kja ama par~…æ…ôkar~…æ ku mamar~…æawp…ôsaj tu a kamu nu bina ¶adan, ƒßini…ôn ku kakawaw kja u tat…ô≈ãa î~ °aj ani pasukas tu sasakamun, par~…æu tat…ô≈ãa î~ ° ku katuudaja bina ¶adan. u sakar~…æima sa, anu tat…ô≈ãa î~ °patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i bina ¶adan ƒßawsa, ku ƒßakar~…æamkam ƒßan pa ¶ur~…æir~…æ patapabaw pa ¶umud i kinpu, tu nisa≈ãa î~ °an tu ƒßur~…æi ¶ nu bina ¶adan, tu sakaj tini i naumaƒßan unubaju, atu sapi sit…ôk…ôd nu bina ¶adan mir~…æƒßida maudip, itini i tajwan kja u tat…ô≈ãa î~ °aj ani patadikud tukawaw.
S.FORM: nakamuwan ni Cay-Ing-Wen cung-tung tu paniyul a sakakapah i 2016 a amihcan u cung-tung nu taywan ci Cay-ing-wen, napatadikud tu kamu paniyul a pakakapah tu nadikudan, i binacadan nu itaywanay, sakamu sa ci Cay-ing-wen, yu mahida henay mahkatayni ku namakayniyay i hulam a tademaw, anu layak aca atu hitay nu Hulam aca, tayni ku heni i taywan sa misawacu i tamuwan u Binacadan a yincumin, saan patadikud tu sasakamun i titaan u Binacadan , u nipatadikud nida tina kamuwan sa, caay kau la'tusay u kapahay tuway kina kawaw tuyniyan, nika, sakamu saan ku katuuday. anu tatenga' patadikud tu sasakamuen, panacacay han ku kawaw kya u tatenga'ay patadikud, saan ku nipangiha' nu katuuday, adiha hansa inayi' ku cacacacay aca nu wayway, tadaw u nipahemul a cacay tu kamu i Binacadan, saan amin ku mitapalay . anu tatenga' mi patadikud tu sasakamun sakamu satu ku mitapalay i tini i taywan; anu i cuwacuwaay a Binacadan, malecalecad ku nipiadih mutapal tina kawawan, i nayi' ku heci nina nipipatadikud tu kamu saan, idayhan u paduh acacay inayi' ku nilacul tu heci saan, u muhalhalay tu amin ku katuuday a Binacadan, tu nipilacul ni Cay-ing-wen tu nakamuwan nida, tu nipatadikudan a kamu tu nilacul a heci, katukuh ayda inayi' ku tekiteki nu nipakilukilul aca, sepat henay a mihcan mamin tu misinkiw, tu sakinatusa nida a malaCung-tung, caay haw? an idaw ku balucu' nida, amipatadikud tu nikapatelacan i tawya i kasumamadan, kau namakay labuway nu balacu' a kamu ku sapatahekal, patengil tu katuuday a binacadan, kya amasinanut ku nipitengil nu katuuday mitapal. wycanan ku pingalalan nu binacadan ayda uycanan ku hahalhalen nu Binacadan tu tatenga'ay a nipatadikud tu sasakamuen, uycanan ku ngalalen nu katuuday tu nipaini tu sasakamuen, wahacacay han nu Kanatal a mupabelih i binawlan, u sasalabuen, u sahenulay a kawaw tu sakay tini i sabawenemay a Binacadan. sakacacay, wahican nu Kanatal pasukas kuni alawan, i Binacadan tu lala'i kasumamadan, u naumahan nu Binawlan i tawya, anyaan pasukas ku kanatal a saheciyn musakamu kya, amasulinga' ku nipitengil nu binawlan. sakatusa, wacaay haw pasukas ku kanatal, tu naumahan nu babalaki i kasumamadan tulala', unaluma'an u nikabulawan malimad,uni kaykaydaan mi lami' miadup atu babutingan, aydaan u papasukasen amin nu kanatal kumahiniyay a lala'. sakatulu, u kamu nu Binacadan i , nikatayniyan nu kahulaman i taywan, lawpes saca kukamu nu Binacadan i nyadu', katukuh ayda amakaala tu waluway abataan ku mihecan, maliyuh tuamin ku wadiwawa nu binacadan, musakamu tu tadakamu nu binacadan, amalawlawpes tu kukamu inyadu', u lalangawen u tuudamin unanam tu sakaudip nunyadu', umahiniyay a kawaw caay kawnikakayi nu binawlan caay kaw nipiales nu binawlan , uni padetengan nu kanatal apa satedep mu sakamu tukamu numita, u mahiniyay a kawaw ahican nu kanatal misakaliyuh ku mahiniyay a kawaw. u sakasepat, wapatibeng mi sanga' ku tkanatal tu cacudadan nu Binacadan, awnu Binacadan amin ku pasubana'ay i cacudadan, kya ama palekal ku mamalawpesay tu a kamu nu binacadan, hinien ku kakawaw kya u tatenga'ay ani pasukas tu sasakamun, palu tatenga' ku katuudaya Binacadan. u sakalima sa, anu tatenga'patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i binacadan hawsa, ku hakalamkam han paculil patapabaw pacumud i kinpu, tu nisanga'an tu hulic nu binacadan, tu sakay tini i naumahan unubayu, atu sapi siteked nu binacadan milhida maudip, itini i taywan kya u tatenga'ay ani patadikud tukawaw.
